arts.ttl: Shearer on his 'concerns' for Man City
arts.sum: Match of the Day's Alan Shearer says Manchester City are showing "worrying signs" after losing 4-0 to Tottenham at home, their fifth loss in a row.

arts.ttl: Man City vs Feyenoord live early team news plus kick-off time and how to watch
arts.sum: Manchester City will look to return to winning ways against Feyenoord in the Champions League at the Etihad on Tuesday night.

arts.ttl: BrandEd launch the 'Manchester City Sports Business School'
arts.sum: In collaboration with Manchester City, the new venture builds on the foundations set by the City Football Leadership Institute (CFLI), originally launched in 2022, and continues to signal the lasting commitment to offering world-leading industry-based education. With Manchester City Sports Business School, BrandEd and Manchester City aim to provide students with exclusive access to a global sports business ecosystem, combining BrandEd’s educational expertise with Manchester City’s deep industry knowledge.

arts.ttl: Vicario played with a broken ankle for an hour during Spurs win over Man City
arts.sum: Guglielmo Vicario has revealed he broke his ankle during during Spurs’ 4-0 win over Manchester City – but played on for an hour anyway. The Italian goalkeeper required treatment following a collision with Man City winger Savinho in the first half. But continued playing for the rest of the match to claim his third clean […] The post Vicario played with a broken ankle for an hour during Spurs win over Man City first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Kyle Walker's company makes £1m profit as Manchester City ace sees wealth soar
arts.sum: Kyle Walker Limited is the company through which the Manchester City player deals with his image rights

arts.ttl: Bargain Man United transfer option can be Amorim's secret weapon as Erling Haaland problem endures
arts.sum: The new Man Utd head coach is bringing plenty of change to Old Trafford, with one of them providing FPL managers with a big opportunity

arts.ttl: Man City vs Feyenoord Preview: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Score Prediction
arts.sum: Manchester City will look to end a five-game losing streak when they host Feyenoord in the Champions League tonight. Ahead of the clash, we’ve made a prediction for the game, provided our pr...

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold hands Liverpool major boost as star returns to training ahead of crunch clashes with Real Madrid and Man City
arts.sum: Alexander-Arnold was forced off during the win over Aston Villa before the international break with a hamstring injury and subsequently pulled out of the England squad.

arts.ttl: Blow for Real Madrid as Haaland close to new Man City contract
arts.sum: Real Madrid and Barcelona have suffered a significant blow in their hopes of signing Erling Haaland as the Man City striker is set to sign a new contract. Haaland’s current contract is set to expire in the summer of 2027 but a new deal will make it difficult for Real Madrid or Barcelona to bring him to La Liga.

arts.ttl: Man City are being punished for their success - and it won't stop any time soon
arts.sum: The amount of competitions and games City are competing in looks like it is catching up with them
